title: Massive Futuristic Planetary Exploration Rover Crossing Dusty
sourceTitle: Massive Futuristic Planetary Exploration Rover Crossing Dusty
prompt: A massive futuristic planetary exploration rover crossing a dusty desert plain, built as a heavy six-wheeled vehicle with oversized rugged tires, reinforced suspension, exposed mechanical joints, visible hydraulic structures, utility panels, ladders, vents, and industrial sci-fi bodywork. The rover has worn white metal armor with orange markings, chipped paint, dust buildup, abrasion, scratches, and realistic field wear across the outer shell. A lone astronaut stands beside the vehicle to show scale, small against the machine, wearing a practical exploration suit and facing the rover. Dry atmosphere, sparse barren landscape, drifting dust, strong sunlight cutting through the scene, dramatic contrast, clear depth, believable materials, grounded realism, clean composition, realistic science fiction mood, highly descriptive surface detail, no extra vehicles, no buildings, no text --ar 16:9 --raw --v 8.1
